Field.name: PrimaryKey
Field.comment: Unique identifier of each record in this table

Field.name: CreationTimestamp
Field.comment: Date and time each record was created

Field.name: CreatedBy
Field.comment: Account name of the user who created each record

Field.name: ModificationTimestamp
Field.comment: Date and time each record was last modified

Field.name: ModifiedBy
Field.comment: Account name of the user who last modified each record

Field.name: Text 1 id
Field.comment: This Text id is shared with FAT Tag::Name Text id

Field.name: List Item PI JSON
Field.comment: Used in Page Item

Calculation.Text: Case ( FAT Block @ Page item::BlockTemplate id = "" ; /* Block not based on template */ Let( [ j1 = JSONSetElement ( "{}" ; "id" ; PrimaryKey ; JSONString ); j2 = Case ( FAT Block @ Page item::List number of textfields > 0 ; JSONSetElement ( j1 ; FAT Block @ Page item::Label override List text 1 JSON ; Case(IsEmpty( FAT Block @ Page item::Label List text 1 JSON embed); Text 1 id; GetAsURLEncoded (TF LI PI 1::Text )); JSONString ) ; j1 ); j3 = Case ( FAT Block @ Page item::List number of textfields > 1 ; JSONSetElement ( j2 ; FAT Block @ Page item::Label override List text 2 JSON ; Case(IsEmpty( FAT Block @ Page item::Label List text 2 JSON embed); Text 2 id; GetAsURLEncoded (TF LI PI 2::Text )); JSONString ) ; j2 ); j4 = Case ( FAT Block @ Page item::List number of textfields > 2 ; JSONSetElement ( j3 ; FAT Block @ Page item::Label override List text 3 JSON ; Case(IsEmpty( FAT Block @ Page item::Label List text 3 JSON embed); Text 3 id; GetAsURLEncoded (TF LI PI 3::Text )); JSONString ) ; j3 ); //j5 = Case ( FAT Block @ Page item::List number of media containers > 0 ; JSONSetElement ( j4 ; FAT Block @ Page item::Label override List media JSON ; Media LI PI 1::Container filename ; JSONString ) ; j4 ); j5 = Case ( FAT Block @ Page item::List number of media containers > 0 And Left ( Media LI PI 1::Media JSON ; 1 )= "{" ; JSONSetElement ( j4 ; FAT Block @ Page item::Label override List media JSON ; Media LI PI 1::Media JSON ; JSONObject); FAT Block @ Page item::List number of media containers > 0 And Left ( Media LI PI 1::Media JSON ; 1 ) ≠ "{" ; JSONSetElement ( j4 ; FAT Block @ Page item::Label override List media JSON ; Media LI PI 1::Media JSON ; JSONString); j4); j6 = Case ( FAT Block @ Page item::List number of value fields = 0 ; j5; FAT Block @ Page item::List ValueType = "None" ; j5; FAT Block @ Page item::List ValueType = "Number"; JSONSetElement ( j5 ; FAT Block @ Page item::Label override List value JSON ; Value 1 ; JSONNumber ); FAT Block @ Page item::List ValueType = "Boolean"; JSONSetElement ( j5 ; FAT Block @ Page item::Label override List value JSON ; Value 1 ; JSONBoolean ); JSONSetElement ( j5 ; FAT Block @ Page item::Label override List value JSON ; Value 1 ; JSONString ) ); j7 = JSONSetElement ( j6 ; [ "tags" ; "[" & Substitute ( List (FAT Tag Value @ LI PI::Tag Value JSON) ; ¶ ; ", " ) & "]" ; JSONArray ]; [ "score_value" ; "[" & Substitute ( List (FAT Score Value @ LI PI::Score Value JSON) ; ¶ ; ", " ) & "]" ; JSONArray ] ; [ "score_condition" ; "[" & Substitute ( List (FAT Score Condition @ LI PI::Score condition JSON) ; ¶ ; ", " ) & "]" ; JSONArray ] ) ]; j7 ) ; /* Block based on template */ Let( [ j1 = JSONSetElement ( "{}" ; "id" ; PrimaryKey ; JSONString ); j2 = Case ( List template @ Page item::Label override text 1 JSON ≠ "" ; JSONSetElement ( j1 ; List template @ Page item::Label override text 1 JSON ; Case(IsEmpty( BlockTemplate @ Page item::Label List text 1 JSON embed); Text 1 id; GetAsURLEncoded (TF LI PI 1::Text )); JSONString ) ; j1 ); j3 = Case ( List template @ Page item::Label override text 2 JSON ≠ "" ; JSONSetElement ( j2 ; List template @ Page item::Label override text 2 JSON ; Case(IsEmpty( BlockTemplate @ Page item::Label List text 2 JSON embed); Text 2 id; GetAsURLEncoded (TF LI PI 2::Text )); JSONString ) ; j2 ); j4 = Case ( List template @ Page item::Label override text 3 JSON ≠ "" ; JSONSetElement ( j3 ; List template @ Page item::Label override text 3 JSON ; Case(IsEmpty( BlockTemplate @ Page item::Label List text 3 JSON embed); Text 3 id; GetAsURLEncoded (TF LI PI 3::Text )); JSONString ) ; j3 ); //j5 = Case ( List template @ Page item::Label override media 1 JSON ≠ "" ; JSONSetElement ( j4 ; List template @ Page item::Label override media 1 JSON ; Media LI PI 1::Container filename ; JSONString ) ; j4 ); j5 = Case ( List template @ Page item::Label override media 1 JSON ≠ "" > 0 And Left ( Media LI PI 1::Media JSON ; 1 )= "{" ; JSONSetElement ( j4 ; FAT Block @ Page item::Label override List media JSON ; Media LI PI 1::Media JSON ; JSONObject); List template @ Page item::Label override media 1 JSON ≠ "" And Left ( Media LI PI 1::Media JSON ; 1 ) ≠ "{" ; JSONSetElement ( j4 ; FAT Block @ Page item::Label override List media JSON ; Media LI PI 1::Media JSON ; JSONString); j4); j6 = Case ( List template @ Page item::Number of value fields = 0 ; j5; List template @ Page item::Value 1 type = "None" ; j5; List template @ Page item::Value 1 type = "Number"; JSONSetElement ( j5 ; List template @ Page item::Label override value 1 JSON ; Value 1 ; JSONNumber ); List template @ Page item::Value 1 type = "Boolean"; JSONSetElement ( j5 ; List template @ Page item::Label override value 1 JSON ; Value 1 ; JSONBoolean ); List template @ Page item::Value 1 type = "IO array"; JSONSetElement ( j5 ; List template @ Page item::Label override value 1 JSON ; "[" & IO id array & "]" ; JSONArray ); JSONSetElement ( j5 ; List template @ Page item::Label override value 1 JSON ; Value 1 ; JSONString ) ); j7 = JSONSetElement ( j6 ; [ "tags" ; "[" & Substitute ( List (FAT Tag Value @ LI PI::Tag Value JSON) ; ¶ ; ", " ) & "]" ; JSONArray ]; [ "score_value" ; "[" & Substitute ( List (FAT Score Value @ LI PI::Score Value JSON) ; ¶ ; ", " ) & "]" ; JSONArray ] ; [ "score_condition" ; "[" & Substitute ( List (FAT Score Condition @ LI PI::Score condition JSON) ; ¶ ; ", " ) & "]" ; JSONArray ] ) ]; j7 ) )

Field.name: List Item JSON
Field.comment: Used in List

Calculation.Text: Let( [ j1 = JSONSetElement ( "{}" ; "id" ; PrimaryKey ; JSONString); j2 = Case ( List template::Number of text fields > 0 ; JSONSetElement ( j1 ; [List template::Label override text 1 JSON ;Text 1 id; JSONString]; ["display_text" ;TF LI 1::Text; JSONString]; ["text_1_id" ;Text 1 id; JSONString] ); j1) ; j3 = Case ( List template::Number of text fields > 1 ; JSONSetElement ( j2 ; [List template::Label override text 2 JSON ; Text 2 id; JSONString]; ["text_2_id" ;Text 2 id; JSONString] ); j2); j4 = Case ( List template::Number of text fields > 2 ; JSONSetElement ( j3 ; [List template::Label override text 3 JSON ; Text 3 id; JSONString]; ["text_3_id" ;Text 3 id; JSONString] ); j3); j5 = Case ( List template::Number of media containers >0 And Left ( Media LI 1::Media JSON ; 1 )= "{" ; JSONSetElement ( j4 ; [List template::Label override media 1 JSON ; Media LI 1::Media JSON ; JSONObject]; ["media_1_id" ; Media LI 1::Media JSON; JSONObject] ); List template::Number of media containers >0 And Left ( Media LI 1::Media JSON ; 1 ) ≠ "{" ; JSONSetElement ( j4 ; [List template::Label override media 1 JSON ; Media LI 1::Media JSON ; JSONString]; ["media_1_id" ; Media LI 1::Media JSON; JSONString] ); j4); j6 = Case ( List template::Number of media containers >1 And Left ( Media LI 2::Media JSON ; 1 )= "{" ; JSONSetElement ( j5 ; [List template::Label override media 2 JSON ; Media LI 2::Media JSON ; JSONObject]; ["media_2_id" ; Media LI 2::Media JSON; JSONObject] ); List template::Number of media containers >1 And Left ( Media LI 2::Media JSON ; 1 ) ≠ "{" ; JSONSetElement ( j5 ; [List template::Label override media 2 JSON ; Media LI 2::Media JSON ; JSONString]; ["media_2_id" ; Media LI 2::Media JSON; JSONString] ); j5); // An identical JSON is also created in FAT IO Value (except Input field values, IO Value conditions and IO Value Sort Order). // If this JSON needs to change - don't forget to change FAT IO Value JSON too. io_json = Case(List template::Value 1 type ≠ "IO"; ""; JSONSetElement ( "{}" ; ["friendly_label_id"; PrettifyUnderScore ( FAT IO @ List Item::Name); JSONString]; ["id"; Value 1; JSONString]; ["type"; IO Type @ List Item::QuidType; JSONString]; ["context"; PrettifyDash (FAT IO @ List Item::IO Write Context); JSONString]; //["read_filter"; PrettifyUnderScore (FAT IO @ List Item::IO Share Context); JSONString]; ["function"; PrettifyDash ( "" ); JSONString]; ["style"; ""; JSONString] ) ); j7 = Case ( // If values fields > 0 add value 1 List template::Number of value fields < 1 ; j6; List template::Value 1 type = "None" ; j6; List template::Value 1 type = "Number"; JSONSetElement ( j6 ; List template::Label override value 1 JSON ; Value 1 ; JSONNumber ); List template::Value 1 type = "Boolean"; JSONSetElement ( j6 ; List template::Label override value 1 JSON ; Value 1 ; JSONBoolean ); List template::Value 1 type = "String" Or List template::Value 1 type = "Color" Or List template::Value 1 type = "Link" Or List template::Value 1 type = "Page navigation"; JSONSetElement ( j6 ; List template::Label override value 1 JSON ; Value 1 ; JSONString ); List template::Value 1 type = "IO"; JSONSetElement ( j6 ; List template::Label override value 1 JSON ; io_json ; JSONObject ); List template::Value 1 type = "IO array"; JSONSetElement ( j6 ; List template::Label override value 1 JSON ; "[" & IO id array & "]" ; JSONArray ) ); j7_2 = Case ( // If values fields > 1 add value 2, if < 2 use previous value List template::Number of value fields < 2 ; j7; List template::Value 2 type = "None" ; j7; List template::Value 2 type = "Number"; JSONSetElement ( j7 ; List template::Label override value 2 JSON ; Value 2 ; JSONNumber ); List template::Value 2 type = "Boolean"; JSONSetElement ( j7 ; List template::Label override value 2 JSON ; Value 2 ; JSONBoolean ); List template::Value 2 type = "String" Or List template::Value 2 type = "Color" Or List template::Value 2 type = "Link" Or List template::Value 2 type = "Page navigation"; JSONSetElement ( j7 ; List template::Label override value 2 JSON ; Value 2 ; JSONString ) ); j7_3 = Case ( // If values fields > 2 add value 3, if < 3 use previous value List template::Number of value fields < 3 ; j7_2; List template::Value 3 type = "None" ; j7_2; List template::Value 3 type = "Number"; JSONSetElement ( j7_2 ; List template::Label override value 3 JSON ; Value 3 ; JSONNumber ); List template::Value 3 type = "Boolean"; JSONSetElement ( j7_2 ; List template::Label override value 3 JSON ; Value 3 ; JSONBoolean ); List template::Value 3 type = "String" Or List template::Value 3 type = "Color" Or List template::Value 3 type = "Link" Or List template::Value 3 type = "Page navigation"; JSONSetElement ( j7_2 ; List template::Label override value 3 JSON ; Value 3 ; JSONString ) ); j8 = JSONSetElement ( j7_3 ; ["friendly_id" ; PrettifyDash ( TF LI 1::Text ) ; JSONString]; ["archived"; Case(Include in export; False; True); JSONBoolean]; [ "tags" ; "[" & Substitute ( List (FAT Tag Value @ LI::Tag Value JSON) ; ¶ ; ", " ) & "]" ; JSONArray ]; [ "score_value" ; "[" & Substitute ( List (FAT Score Value @ LI::Score Value JSON) ; ¶ ; ", " ) & "]" ; JSONArray ] ; [ "score_condition" ; "[" & Substitute ( List (FAT Score Condititon @ LI::Score condition JSON) ; ¶ ; ", " ) & "]" ; JSONArray ] ) ]; j8 )

Field.name: List Item JSON Formatted
Field.comment: Used in List

Field.name: DisplayTextOrValue
Field.comment: When list item connected to a List

Calculation.Text: Let ( [ textStr = Case ( TF LI 1::Text ≠ "" ; TF LI 1::Display text; TF LI 2::Text ≠ "" ; TF LI 2::Display text; TF LI 3::Text ≠ "" ; TF LI 3::Display text; "" ); valueStr = Case ( List template::Value 1 type = "Color"; Color 1 @ LI::Custom Color Name ; List template::Value 1 type = "Link"; FAT Link @ LI::Name ; Value 1) ]; Case (valueStr = ""; textStr ; textStr & ": " & valueStr) )

Field.name: IO id array
Field.comment: A special field only populated when value is more than one IO. This can happen when content array is used for categories.

Field.name: List Item PI JSON Formatted
Field.comment: Used in Page item List

Field.name: Include in export
Field.comment: Decides if item will be included in export or not.

Field.name: Old PrimaryKey from clone
Field.comment: If Title is cloned this id is used for reference in clone script

Field.name: Value 2
Field.comment: Only used by TT Lists

Field.name: Value 3
Field.comment: Only used by TT Lists

Field.name: List Item JSON Copy
Field.comment: Used in List

Calculation.Text: Let( [ j1 = JSONSetElement ( "{}" ; "id" ; PrimaryKey ; JSONString); j2 = Case ( List template::Number of text fields > 0 ; JSONSetElement ( j1 ; List template::Label override text 1 JSON ;Text 1 id; JSONString); j1) ; j3 = Case ( List template::Number of text fields > 1 ; JSONSetElement ( j2 ; List template::Label override text 2 JSON ; Text 2 id; JSONString); j2); j4 = Case ( List template::Number of text fields > 2 ; JSONSetElement ( j3 ; List template::Label override text 3 JSON ; Text 3 id; JSONString); j3); j5 = Case ( List template::Number of media containers >0 And Left ( Media LI 1::Media JSON ; 1 )= "{" ; JSONSetElement ( j4 ; List template::Label override media 1 JSON ; Media LI 1::Media JSON ; JSONObject); List template::Number of media containers >0 And Left ( Media LI 1::Media JSON ; 1 ) ≠ "{" ; JSONSetElement ( j4 ; List template::Label override media 1 JSON ; Media LI 1::Media JSON ; JSONString); j4); j6 = Case ( List template::Number of media containers >1 And Left ( Media LI 2::Media JSON ; 1 )= "{" ; JSONSetElement ( j5 ; List template::Label override media 2 JSON ; Media LI 2::Media JSON ; JSONObject); List template::Number of media containers >1 And Left ( Media LI 2::Media JSON ; 1 ) ≠ "{" ; JSONSetElement ( j5 ; List template::Label override media 2 JSON ; Media LI 2::Media JSON ; JSONString); j5); // An identical JSON is also created in FAT IO Value. // If this JSON needs to change - don't forget to change FAT IO Value JSON too. io_json = Case(List template::Value 1 type ≠ "IO"; ""; JSONSetElement ( "{}" ; ["friendly_label_id"; PrettifyUnderScore ( FAT IO @ List Item::Name); JSONString]; ["id"; Value 1; JSONString]; ["type"; IO Type @ List Item::QuidType; JSONString]; ["context"; PrettifyDash (FAT IO @ List Item::<Field Missing>); JSONString]; //["read_context"; PrettifyUnderScore (Value 2); JSONString]; //["share_context"; PrettifyUnderScore (Value 3); JSONString]; ["function"; PrettifyDash ( "" ); JSONString]; ["style"; ""; JSONString] ) ); j7 = Case ( List template::Number of value fields = 0 ; j5; List template::Value 1 type = "None" ; j5; List template::Value 1 type = "Number"; JSONSetElement ( j5 ; List template::Label override value 1 JSON ; Value 1 ; JSONNumber ); List template::Value 1 type = "Boolean"; JSONSetElement ( j5 ; List template::Label override value 1 JSON ; Value 1 ; JSONBoolean ); List template::Value 1 type = "String" Or List template::Value 1 type = "Color" Or List template::Value 1 type = "Page navigation"; JSONSetElement ( j5 ; List template::Label override value 1 JSON ; Value 1 ; JSONString ); List template::Value 1 type = "IO"; JSONSetElement ( j5 ; List template::Label override value 1 JSON ; io_json ; JSONObject ); List template::Value 1 type = "IO array"; JSONSetElement ( j5 ; List template::Label override value 1 JSON ; "[" & IO id array & "]" ; JSONArray ) ); j8 = JSONSetElement ( j7 ; ["friendly_id" ; PrettifyDash ( TF LI 1::Text ) ; JSONString]; ["archived"; Case(Include in export; False; True); JSONBoolean]; [ "tags" ; "[" & Substitute ( List (FAT Tag Value @ LI::Tag Value JSON) ; ¶ ; ", " ) & "]" ; JSONArray ]; [ "score_value" ; "[" & Substitute ( List (FAT Score Value @ LI::Score Value JSON) ; ¶ ; ", " ) & "]" ; JSONArray ] ; [ "score_condition" ; "[" & Substitute ( List (FAT Score Condititon @ LI::Score condition JSON) ; ¶ ; ", " ) & "]" ; JSONArray ] ) ]; JSONFormatElements (j8) )

Field.name: DisplayTextOrValue PI
Field.comment: When list item connected directly to a page item

Calculation.Text: Case ( TF LI PI 1::Display text ≠ "" ; TF LI PI 1::Display text; TF LI PI 2::Display text ≠ "" ; TF LI PI 2::Display text; Value 1 ≠ "" ; Case ( List template @ Page item::Value 1 type = "Color"; Color @ LI PI::Custom Color Name ; List template @ Page item::Value 1 type = "Link"; FAT Link @ LI PI::Name ; Value 1); "" )

Field.name: List of List items
Field.comment: Used to recreate a fiund set during cloning

Field.name: LastAdaptiveSettingsTab
Field.comment: Panel for Tags, Score change and Score conditions
